item.title: Memory Card Files Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Files Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filesrestore
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Files Restore
(Utilities)
Photo reviving software works on most of windows operating systems like Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8 etc for rescuing digital games from logically affected flash memory card. For downloading snap recouping tool visit website www.filesrestore.com that is able to recover inaccessible images from formatted PDA card. Memory Card Files Restore utility regains deleted text projects from SD cards that harmed by software failure.

[read more]
item.description:
Memory Card Files Restore
(Utilities)
Photo reviving software works on most of windows operating systems like Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8 etc for rescuing digital games from logically affected flash memory card. For downloading snap recouping tool visit website www.filesrestore.com that is able to recover inaccessible images from formatted PDA card. Memory Card Files Restore utility regains deleted text projects from SD cards that harmed by software failure.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Memory Card Files Restore
(Utilities)
Photo reviving software works on most of windows operating systems like Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8 etc for rescuing digital games from logically affected flash memory card. For downloading snap recouping tool visit website www.filesrestore.com that is able to recover inaccessible images from formatted PDA card. Memory Card Files Restore utility regains deleted text projects from SD cards that harmed by software failure.

[read more]

item.title: GAME DOMAIN - NRGD [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GAME DOMAIN - NRGD [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GAME DOMAIN - NRGD
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
GAME DOMAIN Magisk Module by revWhiteShadow: Elevate Your Gaming Experience
The GAME DOMAIN Magisk Module which No Root users can use with shizuku , developed by revWhiteShadow, is a tribute to the anime world's dynamic power moves, inspired by Jujutsu Kaisen's "Domain Expansion." Just as Domain Expansion signifies an overwhelming force, the GAME DOMAIN module brings an unparalleled gaming experience to your Android device.

Game-Specific Kernel Tweaks: 30 Game Tweak Enhancements

GAME DOMAIN caters to a wide range of popular games, providing dedicated kernel tweaks to optimize your gaming sessions. Here are the 23 game-specific kernel tweaks that have been meticulously added:

1. PUBG Mobile (PUBGM)
2. Call of Duty: Mobile (CODM)
3. Genshin Impact
4. Free Fire
5. Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
6. Asphalt 9: Legends
7. Apex Legends Mobile
8. Arena of Valor
9. Critical Ops
10. Dead by Daylight Mobile
11. Mobile Legends: Adventure
12. Black Desert Mobile
13. Injustice 2
14. World War Heroes: WW2 FPS
15. Star Wars: Force Arena
16. Shadowgun Legends
17. Standoff 2
18. Battle Prime
19. Super Mecha Champions
20. Free Fire Max
21. PUBG Mobile Lite
22. Call of Duty: Warzone
23. Tanks A Lot! - Realtime Multiplayer Battle Arena
24. F1 Mobile Racing
25. Real Racing
26. BGMI (Battlegrounds Mobile India)
27. Arena Breakout
28. Minecraft
29. CARxSTREET
30. Diablo Immortal

GAME DOMAIN ensures that each game receives specific optimizations tailored to its requirements. Whether you're battling in the intense landscapes of PUBG Mobile, exploring the fantastical realm of Genshin Impact, or racing through the tracks of Real Racing, this module has you covered.

Revitalize your gaming sessions with GAME DOMAIN and experience the power of dedicated kernel tweaks that enhance performance, graphics, and overall gameplay. Elevate your gaming to the next level and embrace the Domain Expansion of your Android gaming experience.
[read more]

item.title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

https://gitlab.com/posktomten/streamcapture2/-/wikis/home (Website)

https://ceicer.eu/streamcapture2 (Svensk hemsida)

https://youtu.be/I5hJKj7TYxM?si=B-soWX--4jt1qBH- (Video)

Manual English
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_en_US.html
Manual Italian
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_it_IT.html
Manual Svensk
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_sv_SE.html

Video (Swedish)
https://youtu.be/1O9CW81LOIE
[read more]
item.description:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

Video (Swedish)
https://youtu.be/1O9CW81LOIE
[read more]

(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

item.title: Memory Card Files Restore Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Files Restore Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filesrestore
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Files Restore Program
(Utilities)
Best featured Memory Card Files Restore Program helps to users for recouping accidentally deleted media files like text documents, word files, excel sheets, presentations, database files, screenshots, graphics, animations etc from corrupted compact flash card easily. SDHC plus card data reviving tool provides advance option of automatic data recovery that facilitates users to recollect whole missing files from mini SD card without any effort in easiest manner.

[read more]
item.description:
Memory Card Files Restore Program
(Utilities)
Best featured Memory Card Files Restore Program helps to users for recouping accidentally deleted media files like text documents, word files, excel sheets, presentations, database files, screenshots, graphics, animations etc from corrupted compact flash card easily. SDHC plus card data reviving tool provides advance option of automatic data recovery that facilitates users to recollect whole missing files from mini SD card without any effort in easiest manner.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Memory Card Files Restore Program
(Utilities)
Best featured Memory Card Files Restore Program helps to users for recouping accidentally deleted media files like text documents, word files, excel sheets, presentations, database files, screenshots, graphics, animations etc from corrupted compact flash card easily. SDHC plus card data reviving tool provides advance option of automatic data recovery that facilitates users to recollect whole missing files from mini SD card without any effort in easiest manner.

[read more]

item.title: Mac Data Restore Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac Data Restore Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbrestoresoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Mac Data Restore Software
(Utilities)
Are you looking to salvage your precious files from formatted pen drive? If yes, don’t go anywhere! Just click on www.usbrestore.com for getting advanced Mac Data Restore Software that helps to rescue misplaced or deleted images, documents, and media files from logically corrupted USB mass storage disk drives. Versatile Mac pen drive recovery tool provides option to restore lost data even “drive not formatted” error message displayed on computer screen while accessing the device.

[read more]
item.description:
Mac Data Restore Software
(Utilities)
Are you looking to salvage your precious files from formatted pen drive? If yes, don’t go anywhere! Just click on www.usbrestore.com for getting advanced Mac Data Restore Software that helps to rescue misplaced or deleted images, documents, and media files from logically corrupted USB mass storage disk drives. Versatile Mac pen drive recovery tool provides option to restore lost data even “drive not formatted” error message displayed on computer screen while accessing the device.

[read more]

Are you looking to salvage your precious files from formatted pen drive? If yes, don’t go anywhere! Just click on www.usbrestore.com for getting advanced Mac Data Restore Software that helps to rescue misplaced or deleted images, documents, and media files from logically corrupted USB mass storage disk drives. Versatile Mac pen drive recovery tool provides option to restore lost data even “drive not formatted” error message displayed on computer screen while accessing the device.

[read more]

item.title: Digital Camera Restore Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Restore Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbrestoresoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Restore Software
(Utilities)
Company suggests you to download Digital Camera Restore Software on Windows PC that consists of advance scanning techniques used to restore erased photos, pictures, snapshots, videos in original format without any need of applying programming skills. File retrieval application also restore deleted files and folders as well as save them at any safe PC location for future use in an effective manner. Data recovery software supports all latest versions of Windows OS for proper restoration of lost data.

[read more]
item.description:
Digital Camera Restore Software
(Utilities)
Company suggests you to download Digital Camera Restore Software on Windows PC that consists of advance scanning techniques used to restore erased photos, pictures, snapshots, videos in original format without any need of applying programming skills. File retrieval application also restore deleted files and folders as well as save them at any safe PC location for future use in an effective manner. Data recovery software supports all latest versions of Windows OS for proper restoration of lost data.

[read more]

Digital Camera Restore Software

File retrieval application also restore deleted files and folders as well as save them at any safe PC location for future use in an effective manner. Data recovery software supports all latest versions of Windows OS for proper restoration of lost data.

item.title: Restore OSX [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Restore OSX [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecove
item.itunes:summary:
Restore OSX
(Utilities)
Restore OSX is comprehensive recovery program that used to restore lost data from inaccessible memory cards on Mac system. Users can revive different types of data like digital images, snapshots, videos, pictures and music files from memory cards.
[read more]
item.description:
Restore OSX
(Utilities)
Restore OSX is comprehensive recovery program that used to restore lost data from inaccessible memory cards on Mac system. Users can revive different types of data like digital images, snapshots, videos, pictures and music files from memory cards.

Restore OSX is comprehensive recovery program that used to restore lost data from inaccessible memory cards on Mac system. Users can revive different types of data like digital images, snapshots, videos, pictures and music files from memory cards.

item.title: Digital Camera Data Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Data Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbrestoresoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Data Restore
(Utilities)
www.usbrestore.com offers complete solution to easily recover damage photographs due to resetting USB media. Digital Camera Data Restore Software successfully retrieves all valuable wedding images or video clips in just single duration of time without need any technical expert guidance or prior knowledge. Picture recovery software is the most popular in all small to large business industries to quick restore their missing photographs, screenshots, snaps or desktop wallpaper in minimum span of time. Digital Camera Data Restore Software easily works with major file formats including all common images like jpeg, jpg, bmp, gif, tiff etc and audio-video files include wav, mpeg etc. Photo recovery tool provide best Graphical user Interface to restore mistakenly lost memorable images or other screenshots due to the worm infection presents on computer system. Picture restore tool does not need any extra prior knowledge to operate this application on system to find out corrupted files and folders. Image retrieval tool facilitates you to quickly scan entire digital camera on personal computer system to search out accidentally lost valuable pictures or some great snaps. Image file restore application works as professionally on your computer system to easily retrieve baby snaps or other major picture in just one click of mouse button.Features:-* Digital camera data restore tool is fully capable to easily retrieve mistakenly delete memorable photographs on computer system.* Software provides comprehensive solution for all users to instantly recover their images that recently lost from storage media.* Image retrieval tool effectual in all business industries to quick retrieve lost official files or text documents from system.* Software conveniently recovers all general types of images, desktop wallpaper or other great picture in very short interval of time.

[read more]
item.description:
Digital Camera Data Restore

Image file restore application works as professionally on your computer system to easily retrieve baby snaps or other major picture in just one click of mouse button.Features:-* Digital camera data restore tool is fully capable to easily retrieve mistakenly delete memorable photographs on computer system.* Software provides comprehensive solution for all users to instantly recover their images that recently lost from storage media.* Image retrieval tool effectual in all business industries to quick retrieve lost official files or text documents from system.* Software conveniently recovers all general types of images, desktop wallpaper or other great picture in very short interval of time.

[read more]
